version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="vlXeGeStuWS1tnfRG7B7" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-434" dy="-181" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Context Engineering: Failure Modes & Mitigations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="680" x="80" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#666666;fontColor=#ffffff;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;" value="Failure Mode" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="180" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#666666;fontColor=#ffffff;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;" value="Description" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="220" x="260" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#666666;fontColor=#ffffff;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;" value="Mitigation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="240" x="500" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="☢ Context Poisoning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="60" y="136" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fd1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9f9;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="A hallucination or error enters the context and gets repeatedly referenced, compounding mistakes over the conversation." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="260" y="136" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm1_mit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Validate tool outputs before adding to context. Use reversible compression. Implement error-checking agents." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="500" y="136" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="💤 Context Distraction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="60" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fd2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffaf5;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Excessive context causes the model to over-focus on history rather than applying its trained knowledge, degrading performance." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="260" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm2_mit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Apply trimming and summarization. Use the COMPRESS strategy. Keep recent tool outputs (last 3-5 calls) and archive older ones." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="500" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="🌀 Context Confusion" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="60" y="336" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fd3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffdf5;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Too many irrelevant tools or documents dilute the signal. Models perform worse with more tools (Berkeley leaderboard finding)." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="260" y="336" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm3_mit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Use dynamic tool selection (semantic search over tool descriptions). Keep only relevant context per step. Minimize toolset overlap." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="500" y="336" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="⚡ Context Clash" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="60" y="436" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fd4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9f5ff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Contradictory information in context derails reasoning. Once wrong, LLMs tend not to self-correct mid-trajectory." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="260" y="436" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm4_mit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Deduplicate and reconcile retrieved facts before injection. Use structured state schema. Apply chain-of-thought to surface contradictions." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="500" y="436" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="💀 Context Rot" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="60" y="536" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fd5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f9ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="As total tokens grow, recall accuracy degrades. GPT-4o dropped from 98.1% to 64.1% accuracy based solely on context size." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="260" y="536" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fm5_mit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Proactively compact at 95% window capacity. Use multi-agent isolation for tasks exceeding 50k tokens. Offload to external memory." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="500" y="536" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" edge="1" parent="1" source="fm1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="fd1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" edge="1" parent="1" source="fm2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="fd2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" edge="1" parent="1" source="fm3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="fd3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" edge="1" parent="1" source="fm4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="fd4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a5" edge="1" parent="1" source="fm5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="fd5" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" edge="1" parent="1" source="fd1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="fm1_mit" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" edge="1" parent="1" source="fd2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="fm2_mit" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" edge="1" parent="1" source="fd3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="fm3_mit" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" edge="1" parent="1" source="fd4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="fm4_mit" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" edge="1" parent="1" source="fd5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="fm5_mit" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Validate tool outputs before adding to context. Use reversible compression. Implement error-checking agents.

div.div: Excessive context causes the model to over-focus on history rather than applying its trained knowledge, degrading performance.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 271px; margin-left: 456px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Apply trimming and summarization. Use the COMPRESS strategy. Keep recent tool outputs (last 3-5 calls) and archive older ones.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 371px; margin-left: 16px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 371px; margin-left: 216px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Too many irrelevant tools or documents dilute the signal. Models perform worse with more tools (Berkeley leaderboard finding).

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 371px; margin-left: 456px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Use dynamic tool selection (semantic search over tool descriptions). Keep only relevant context per step. Minimize toolset overlap.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 471px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 471px; margin-left: 216px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Contradictory information in context derails reasoning. Once wrong, LLMs tend not to self-correct mid-trajectory.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 471px; margin-left: 456px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Deduplicate and reconcile retrieved facts before injection. Use structured state schema. Apply chain-of-thought to surface contradictions.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 571px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 249, 255), rgb(21, 24, 29)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 571px; margin-left: 216px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: As total tokens grow, recall accuracy degrades. GPT-4o dropped from 98.1% to 64.1% accuracy based solely on context size.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 571px; margin-left: 456px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Proactively compact at 95% window capacity. Use multi-agent isolation for tasks exceeding 50k tokens. Offload to external memory.
